message.content:
@startuml
participant "客户端" as Client
participant "AMS" as AMS
participant "UserControl" as UserControl

Client -> AMS : registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)
note left of Client : 注册回调接口
AMS -> UserControl : registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)

Client -> AMS : switchUser()
AMS --> UserControl : startUser()
note over UserControl : 执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG
UserControl -> UserControl : dispatchUserSwitch

AMS <- UserControl
Client <- AMS : IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitching(newUserId, callback)
note over Client : 通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS

Client --> AMS : IRemoteCallback.sendResult()
note over AMS : 等待所有客户端处理完成之后继续进行切换用户的工作
AMS <- UserControl
UserControl -> UserControl : continueUserSwitch()

note over AMS : 结束冻屏，并停止在后台的访客用户
UserControl -> UserControl : dispatchUserSwitchComplete()

note over AMS : 通过回调方法通知客户端进行用户切换的收尾工作
Client <- AMS : IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitchComplete(userId)

@enduml
